v1.0.7.0: fix config save — use camelCase for Jellyfin 10.11.x JSON serialization

Jellyfin 10.11.x serializes plugin config as camelCase (tmdbApiKey, not TmdbApiKey).
The settings page was reading/writing PascalCase properties which were always undefined,
causing all settings to silently fail to load and save.

commit.message:
feat: support GITHUB_TOKEN for mining private repo reviews (#5)

The persona miner was making unauthenticated GitHub API calls,
so it could only see public repos. Now picks up GITHUB_TOKEN or
GH_TOKEN from the environment to authenticate, enabling access
to private repos the user has access to.

commit.message:
fix(desktop): fix mac-arm64 updater yml to use latest-mac.yml as primary entry

electron-updater generic provider reads latest-mac.yml on macOS regardless
of arch; previously arm64 clients were mapped to latest-mac-arm64.yml which
caused update detection failures. Now both arm64 and x64 write latest-mac.yml,
and latest-mac-arm64.yml is generated as a compatibility alias.

Add hotel/guest house/resort subcategories, prominent category filters, and place enrichment

- Split hotels into hotel (246), guest_house (128), and resort (65) using OSM tags
- Add prominent category buttons for hotels, guest houses, resorts, beaches, car rental, nightlife

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: update context and reference docs for SSO, integration registry, and AI advisor

Updated `.ai/context/` and `.ai/reference/` docs to reflect new SSO authentication via next-auth 5.0, curated integration registry with global credentials management, and Claude-powered AI advisor for integrations.

**Architecture Changes:**
- SSO login flow replacing password auth in admin dashboard
- Integration registry with per-system field definitions
- AI advisor chat endpoint with per-integration knowledge base
- Global credentials storage alongside per-user credentials
- New DB tables: integration_registry, global_credentials, SSO user fields

**Auth Changes:**
- next-auth 5.0 middleware for Azure AD and Google SSO
- SSO validation endpoint (POST /api/sso/validate) called by dashboard
- First admin seeded via CLI with SSO email identity
- Device-bound API keys remain independent from SSO auth

**API Changes:**
- New integrations REST API routes for registry and global credentials management
- New advisor chat endpoint (POST /api/advisor/chat) with streaming responses
- SSO validation and provider configuration

**Environment Variables:**
- NEXTAUTH_SECRET, NEXTAUTH_URL, AUTH_TRUST_HOST for next-auth
- AZURE_AD_* and GOOGLE_* for SSO provider configuration
- ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for AI advisor Claude integration

**Dependencies:**
- Added: next-auth (SSO), @anthropic-ai/sdk (AI advisor)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: wire MiniMax API key through service layer and Settings UI

MiniMax was declared as a valid service name but missing from key-mapping,
api-key-service switch, and Settings UI — so the music generator could
never retrieve the key at runtime. Added audio.minimax.apiKey path across
all four files.

Multi-Stripe paid-members dashboard, webhook profile fixes, and email domain consolidation

- Add getAllStripeClients() to query all market Stripe accounts in parallel
- Update paid-members page to show unified view across Lancaster + Cumberland Stripe accounts
- Fix webhook profile upserts: full_name → display_name, remove nonexistent stripe_customer_id and is_premium columns
- Consolidate all email sending to tastelanc.com parent domain (EMAIL_SENDER_DOMAIN constant)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: implement SSO authentication, integration registry, and AI advisor

This commit brings major new capabilities to the Cowork MCP Gateway:

**SSO Authentication**
- Azure AD (Microsoft Entra ID) and Google sign-in via next-auth 5.0
- Device-bound auth with machine UUID + API key verification
- Admin access token refresh pattern with encrypted secrets
- SSO validation endpoint in server (POST /api/sso/validate)
- Middleware and login flow in dashboard with session persistence

**Integration Registry**
- Curated integration definitions with per-system field schemas
- Support for HubSpot, O365, ConnectWise, Monday.com with structured configs
- Global credentials storage with per-field encryption
- Integrations REST API routes (POST /api/integrations, GET, PATCH, DELETE)
- Structured setup flow for new integrations

**AI Advisor**
- Claude API integration with per-integration knowledge base indexing
- Interactive chat component in integration detail page
- System knowledge prompt for improved recommendations
- Async chat API endpoint (POST /api/advisor/chat)

**Docker & Deployment**
- docker-compose.yml with services (server, dashboard, nginx, sqlite)
- Separate Dockerfiles for server and dashboard
- Entrypoint script with auto-key generation and environment setup
- basePath support in Next.js for /admin subdirectory routing
- Proper ENV passthrough, rewrite routing, and .dockerignore

**Database**
- Migration 002: SSO user fields (provider, provider_id, name, email)
- Integration config and credentials tables with RBAC permissions
- Encryption key management

**Dashboard Updates**
- basePath fixes throughout navigation, links, API calls, redirects
- New login page with SSO provider buttons
- Updated layout with new integrations management section
- User detail page expanded for SSO provider info
- Integration setup and advisor UI components

**Infrastructure**
- .env.example with all required env vars (Azure AD, Google, SMTP, AI)
- Updated seed-admin CLI with SSO user creation
- Shared types extended for SSO, integrations, advisor APIs
- Updated package.json with next-auth, crypto, and AI dependencies
- Turbo pipeline config for new tasks

commit.message:
fix: Trigger Reddit sentiment on opening night

opening-night-reviews.yml runs at midnight EST when Reddit discussion
actually exists. The existing trigger in update-show-status.yml fires
at 3 AM EST (before any discussion). This ensures Reddit audience data
is populated by the morning after opening night.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add credit reservation system to prevent agent race conditions

Agents on the same team could race for credits during concurrent sprints,
causing one agent to see "0 credits" mid-sprint even though the team had
a sufficient balance when the heartbeat started. Now credits are reserved
atomically before a sprint begins and unused credits are refunded after.

- Add reserveCredits() and releaseCredits() to billing.ts
- Scheduler reserves credits before task sprints, mentions, and proactive
  check-ins — runtime skips per-iteration deduction (skipCredits flag)
- Unused reserved credits are refunded when sprint ends or errors out
- Covers all 3 runReactLoop call sites in the scheduler

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: remove stale native HLS error listener in cleanup()

Storing handler reference in _nativeErrHandler so cleanup() can
explicitly remove it. Prevents duplicate scheduleRetry() calls when
mode switches (H→V) accumulate multiple { once:true } error listeners
on the video element — stale timers firing extra start() calls.

commit.message:
Add git workflow and domain isolation rules to CLAUDE.md

Agents must commit-only (no push) by default and declare their domain
at the start of each task. Cross-domain edits require explicit user
approval. Prevents parallel agents from conflicting and reduces
accidental deploys.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

성능 개선: saveWrongAnswer에서 불필요한 getDoc 제거

getDoc으로 기존 문서 확인 후 increment하던 로직을 단순 increment(1)로 복원.
오답 1건당 Firestore read 1회 절감 → 결과 표시 속도 원복.
_savedInSession Set이 이미 세션 내 중복 저장을 방지하므로 getDoc 불필요.

commit.message:
refactor: Migrate 15 workflows from inline git push to push-with-retry.sh

Replaced duplicated retry loops (for/while + git pull --rebase + sleep)
with the shared `scripts/lib/push-with-retry.sh` script across 15 CI
workflows. The shared script provides consistent retry logic with
rebase + merge fallback, random backoff, and proper error reporting.

-281 lines of duplicated boilerplate across:
adjudicate-review-queue, audit-review-quality, backfill-aggregators,
batch-commercial-research, bulk-collect-review-texts, fetch-guardian,
overnight-collect, process-review-submission, review-refresh,
scoring-audit, scoring-experiment, scrape-bww-reviews,
scrape-new-aggregators, update-commercial, update-show-status

7 workflows intentionally not migrated (GitLab mirrors, special branch
push patterns).

commit.message:
feat(skills): add two-phase generation strategy to spec-create, spec-rewrite, spec-upgrade

Based on structured discussion (7 rounds), adds size-based automatic
two-phase (skeleton → fill) generation to prevent context window overflow
and maintain quality consistency in large spec documents.

Thresholds: spec-create >= 30 source files, spec-rewrite/upgrade >= 300 lines.
Phase 2 executes §1-§3 sequentially then §4-§8 in parallel via sub-agents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Explicitly dispatch rebuild after collection instead of relying on workflow_run

GitHub's workflow_run events are silently dropped during high-activity periods,
breaking the collect → rebuild → score cascade. This adds an explicit dispatch
with dedup guard (skips if rebuild already running) as belt-and-suspenders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Sync deploy watermark after every rebuild to prevent deploy blockage

Previously the deploy watermark was only updated after successful deploys,
creating a chicken-and-egg problem: if a rebuild legitimately reduced review
count (e.g., excluding wrongProduction reviews), the stale watermark blocked
every subsequent deploy. This required manual watermark edits to unblock.

Now rebuild-all-reviews.js syncs the watermark after writing reviews.json,
so pre-deploy-check.js always sees counts matching the last successful rebuild.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: inline comment --line-type flag (#19)

feat: replace --to-line/--from-line with --line and --line-type for inline comments

Replace the Cloud-centric --to-line/--from-line flags with --line and --line-type
(added/removed/context) which maps directly to Bitbucket Server's anchor model.

Line type to file type mapping:
- added → ADDED/TO (new file line number)
- removed → REMOVED/FROM (old file line number)
- context → CONTEXT/FROM (old file line number, server always resolves against old file)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- LLM can override deterministic role when it disagrees (buyer > investor/unknown)

revert: remove codex adapter from implement-task

The multi-adapter dispatch feature (Codex + Claude) introduced too many
layers of nested agent delegation. Subagents consistently failed to run
gauntlet due to Bun stdout dropping, recovery path complexity, and lock
file contention. Reverts to Claude-only subagent dispatch with improved
gauntlet instructions.

See docs/adr/0001-remove-codex-adapter.md for full rationale.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: flokay
repository.description: Flokay is a Claude plugin that provides a set of Agent Skills and an OpenSpec schema for spec-driven development.

commit.message:
fix: Add email capture integrity test + fix BTC fake email submit

- Improve email-capture-integrity.test.mjs to catch onClick handlers
  (not just onSubmit), add regression guards for EmailCaptureModal
  and ProGateContext recapture logic
- Fix BeatTheCriticsClient: handleEmailSave was a fake setTimeout
  that never read the email input or POSTed anywhere — now submits
  to Formspree like all other email capture points
- Add test to CI (test.yml no-data-dependency unit tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Add variable typing delays based on character type (punctuation, spaces)
- Increase speed for more responsive feel
- Simulate realistic human typing patterns

fix: Update deploy watermark after contentVerification cleanup

666 wrong-production/wrong-show reviews were correctly excluded by the
contentVerification flag promotion fix. The deploy watermark needs to
reflect the new baseline (17418) so deploys stop failing.

commit.message:
功能: Conversation Agent 飞书流式卡片支持 (#158)

* 功能: Conversation Agent 飞书流式卡片支持

为子会话（conversation agent）添加飞书流式卡片打字机效果：
- processAgentConversation 中创建 streaming session
- text_delta 事件实时喂入流式卡片
- 完成时 complete() 替代静态消息，失败时 fallback
- finally 中清理 streaming session 并 unregister

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* 修复: conversation agent catch 块补设 hadError 确保流式卡片正确 abort

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
chore: sync skills, docs, and roles for SteamOS and extended display work

Major update covering multiple areas:
- Skills: upgrade all swain-* skills, add swain-keys, remove deprecated
  skill-manager and update-agents-core, migrate bug tracking to issue
  integration, add tk task CLI and bookmark support
- Docs: complete SPIKE-013 (extended desktop), approve DESIGN-001,
  draft SPEC-006..009 and STORY-014 for SteamOS provisioning
- Roles: replace Weylus with BetterDisplay/Moonlight/Sunshine in display
  role, add productivity role (Todoist), update git-repo-scanner
- Beads: sync issue tracker backup and update hooks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
